channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Mental health disorders become top global disability cause as cases near 1.2 billion
item.description: Mental health disorders are now the leading cause of disability worldwide, according to a major new study.

item.title: Bundibugyo Ebola Update: Are New Defenses on the Horizon?
item.description: Global health agencies are accelerating vaccine and therapeutic research because the Bundibugyo Ebola outbreak highlights the absence of approved countermeasures.

item.title: Early-Life Stress Raises Gastrointestinal Disease Risk
item.description: A study finds adverse early events are linked to gut-brain disruptions in mice and humans. Medscape Medical News

item.title: Modest Protein Restriction Tied to Better Outcomes in CKD
item.description: A moderately protein-restricted diet is tied to favorable kidney outcomes in patients with chronic kidney disease stage III or IV, according to a recent study.
